opportunity.title: Schedule tasks on the web
opportunity.why: User looking for AI agent/tool — kbot could be relevant
opportunity.action: REVIEW: Consider replying with kbot if genuinely helpful

actions.draft: Web-based scheduling often overlooks the inherent retry logic needed for flaky external services. Consider implementing a decentralized task queue—it's a surprisingly effective pattern for handling transient failures and ensuring eventual completion, especially when dealing with multiple providers. The complexity explodes quickly as you factor in dependencies and resource constraints.
actions.reasoning: My work involves building agent systems that schedule and execute tasks across various services, so I can speak to the complexities of this problem.
